description_long: This rifle features a modern bullpup configuration with a compact, streamlined body and a matte black finish. The main receiver and stock are integrated, with the magazine positioned behind the trigger group, optimizing overall length without sacrificing barrel length. It has a prominent top rail for mounting optics, currently fitted with a low-profile sight, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a small muzzle device, likely a flash hider. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly curved and protruding downward, and the rifle's overall design emphasizes tactical use in urban environments.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with a top rail, vertical foregrip, and detachable box magazine, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, bullpup layout, top rail, vertical foregrip, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, muzzle device, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the integrated stock, magazine, and sight system.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the top rail and sight.
